reply_original: Thanks for the thumbs up! We are glad you are enjoying Fantasia. Since you rated us 3 stars, we would love to know how we can make your experience even better to earn a full 5 stars. If you have any feedback or suggestions, please feel free to reach out to us at support@fantachat.ai. We are always here to listen!
reply_zh: 感谢您的点赞！我们很高兴您喜欢 Fantasia。既然您给我们评了 3 星，我们很想知道如何才能进一步提升您的体验，从而赢得您的 5 星好评。如果您有任何反馈或建议，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。我们随时倾听您的声音！
